Event: Cornucopia Island October 2025
Event Date: 16/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM255


Other locations the gear can be found
Cornucopia Heroic Challenge
Last Stronghold Amulet

Once in a while, the unit removes 3 random negative effects from themselves and 2 allied units with the lowest health. The ability's targets restore 25% health and gain a shield that blocks 384000 damage of any kind for 3 sec. They also become immune to movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly, and fear for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
